		to = 33.5.15
		monthly_chance = 100
	}

		name = antq_m11_flavor.6035.a
	}

		tag = XAA
		from = 64.10.19
		to = 64.12.20
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m11_flavor.6071.a
	}

	}

		to = 192.10.8

		to = 408.10.8
		monthly_chance = 100
	}

		name = antq_m11_flavor.6285.a

		tag = XAA
		from = 455.5.27
		to = 455.7.28
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m11_flavor.6321.a
	}
}
